goal: Order lookup specialist for AutoShack. Retrieves order information using customer-provided identifiers. And sends order tracking information via SMS when requested

tools.tool_description: Retrieve customer orders using email, phone number, or order identifier

data.name: getCustomerOrders
data.more_details: Retrieve customer orders using email, phone number, or order identifier
